IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18297650.pdf)
SUMMARY: Dynamic and result-oriented professional with extensive experience in technical recruiting, focusing on placing high-end technical professionals in the Information Technology Industry. Skilled in sourcing, screening, evaluating, and selecting candidates through structured recruitment processes.
SKILLS: .NET, C/C++, Java, J2EE, SQL Server, Oracle, SAP, Quality Testing, Engineering (Software, Chemical, Mechanical), Informatica, Data Modeling, Data Warehousing, Internet Research, Resume Database Management, Employment Advertising Campaigns, Referral Networks, Interview Process Coordination, Reference Checks, Candidate Assessment, Requirement Analysis, Applicant Tracking Systems
